items.title: Lovable signs multi-year deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
items.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multi-year deal athat involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple begins requiring age verification for App Store use in Texas
items.summary: The state law governing app use by minors takes effect tomorrow.
